DW-12.intent: Add a registry 'encrypted' column + a distinct EncryptionKeyMissing error variant and honest IPC/UI restore-failure surface; make find_restorable_accounts passphrase-aware; add a crash-recovery sweep GCing store_passphrase/session entries orphaned by an add that died before the registry-row insert. Likely alongside Epic 3 UTD/verification honest states.
DW-12.label: Add encrypted flag + honest state

DW-19.label: Leave honest waiting screen
DW-19.resolution: Keep the current honest-but-mislabeled QR waiting screen until a live QR validation session is available.

DW-28.intent: Add a load-timeout stall heuristic and a fallback surface (download / open-externally button) when the audio element neither loads nor errors.
DW-28.label: Stall timeout + download fallback

DW-29.intent: Enforce a max-size guard at or above the epic's 25 MB video bar, rejecting oversized media (413) before the whole-file load, coordinated with the send-side cap in DW-31.
DW-29.label: Cap honoring 25 MB bar

DW-31.intent: Enforce a pre-send upload ceiling honoring the homeserver m.upload.size limit with a friendly pre-send error, coordinated with the receive-side cap in DW-29.
DW-31.label: Ceiling honoring m.upload.size

DW-38.intent: Add the 4.1 unread/mention treatment to compact Favorites rows and emit the needed unread/mention state for favourited rooms.
DW-38.label: Add unread/mention cue

DW-52.intent: Audit every Client clone in shutdown() and guarantee the last one is dropped before sign_out_cleanup, so EventCacheDropHandles fire and release SQLite handles before dir removal.
DW-52.label: Guarantee last-Client-drop

DW-54.label: Measure first
DW-54.resolution: Measure real disk-growth expectations before committing to a retention policy.

DW-56.intent: Broaden management-room detection to also treat a joined room whose only other member is a known bot MXID as a management DM, rather than trusting the m.direct flag alone.
DW-56.label: Broaden detection

DW-57.intent: Probe/accept configured appservice/bridge domain(s) in addition to the account's own server when building probe MXIDs and matching DM targets.
DW-57.label: Probe bridge domains

DW-8.intent: On sign-out of a StoredSession::Oauth account, best-effort call client.oauth() logout/revocation before local teardown, tolerating failure so offline sign-out still converges. Leave AD-10's local-only path unchanged for password sessions.
DW-8.label: Carve out OAuth revocation
